login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password
login.welcomeSubtitle: Continue your learning journey and conquer new challenges.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Enter your personal information
register.welcomeSubtitle: Join thousands of learners building their skills with us.

errors.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use. Please choose another email.
errors.phoneTaken: This phone number is already in use.

verifyEmail.checkingDesc: Please wait a moment while we check your verification code.
verifyEmail.successRedirect: Email verified successfully. Redirecting you home...
verifyEmail.failedDesc: The verification link is invalid or expired.
verifyEmail.tokenInvalid: The verification code is invalid or expired.
verifyEmail.pendingDesc: We sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.checkSpam: Don't see the email? Please check your spam folder.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email — we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDesc: If {{email}} has an account, we've sent a reset link. It expires in 30 minutes.
forgotPassword.sentSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.

errors.tooManyRequestsWithTime: You just requested one. Please try again in {{seconds}}s.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.sendFailed: Couldn't send email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.desc: The password reset link is missing or broken. Please request a new one.

resetPassword.successDesc: Please sign in with your new password.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.invalidOrExpired: The link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
